parameters.query: SELECT metric_value FROM autoflow_events WHERE service_name = '{{ $json.service_name }}' AND metric_type = '{{ $json.metric_type }}' AND recorded_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 60;

INSERT INTO autoflow_events (event_id, service_name, namespace, pod_name, node_name, metric_type, metric_value, metric_unit, source, environment, is_anomaly, z_score, baseline_mean, baseline_stddev, anomaly_severity, confidence, detection_method, raw_payload, recorded_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.event_id }}', '{{ $json.service_name }}', '{{ $json.namespace }}', {{ $json.pod_name !== null ? "'" + $json.pod_name + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.node_name !== null ? "'" + $json.node_name + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.metric_type }}', {{ $json.metric_value }}, '{{ $json.metric_unit }}', '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.environment }}', {{ $json.is_anomaly }}, {{ $json.z_score }}, {{ $json.baseline_mean }}, {{ $json.baseline_stddev }}, '{{ $json.anomaly_severity }}', {{ $json.confidence }}, '{{ $json.detection_method }}', '{{ $json.safe_raw_payload }}', '{{ $json.timestamp }}') RETURNING id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', event_id: $('Z-Score Anomaly Detection').first().json.event_id, is_anomaly: false, message: 'Event logged. No anomaly detected.' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $('Z-Score Anomaly Detection').first().json;
return { json: input };

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are the Anomaly Agent for AutoFlow, an autonomous IT operations system. Analyse infrastructure telemetry and assess the statistical severity of the anomaly. Respond with ONLY valid JSON, no explanation, no markdown, no code blocks.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Analyse this infrastructure anomaly and return ONLY this exact JSON structure:
{"agent":"anomaly","score":<float 0.0-1.0>,"reasoning":"<2 sentence max>","recommended_action":"<one of: ignore|alert|restart_pod|scale_service|reroute_traffic>","confidence":<float 0.0-1.0>}

Incident data:
Service: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.service_name + '
Namespace: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.namespace + '
Metric: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_type + '
Current Value: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_value + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_unit + '
Z-Score: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.z_score + '
Baseline Mean: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.baseline_mean + '
Baseline StdDev: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.baseline_stddev + '
Severity: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.anomaly_severity + '
Detection Confidence: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.confidence + '
Historical Samples Used: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.historical_samples }], max_tokens: 300, temperature: 0.1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are the Risk Agent for AutoFlow. Assess blast radius — if this service fails completely, what is the downstream impact? Consider service criticality, dependencies, and cascading failure probability. Respond with ONLY valid JSON, no explanation, no markdown.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Assess the risk and return ONLY this exact JSON:
{"agent":"risk","score":<float 0.0-1.0>,"blast_radius":"<one of: low|medium|high|critical>","reasoning":"<2 sentence max>","recommended_action":"<one of: ignore|alert|restart_pod|scale_service|reroute_traffic>","confidence":<float 0.0-1.0>}

Incident data:
Service: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.service_name + '
Namespace: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.namespace + '
Environment: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.environment + '
Metric: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_type + ' at ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_value + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_unit + '
Anomaly Severity: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.anomaly_severity }], max_tokens: 300, temperature: 0.1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are the SLA Agent for AutoFlow. Evaluate SLA breach risk. If this anomaly continues, how quickly will service level agreements be violated? Respond with ONLY valid JSON, no explanation, no markdown.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Evaluate SLA risk and return ONLY this exact JSON:
{"agent":"sla","score":<float 0.0-1.0>,"time_to_breach_minutes":<integer or null>,"reasoning":"<2 sentence max>","recommended_action":"<one of: ignore|alert|restart_pod|scale_service|reroute_traffic>","confidence":<float 0.0-1.0>}

Incident data:
Service: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.service_name + '
Metric: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_type + ' at ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_value + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_unit + '
Environment: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.environment + '
Z-Score: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.z_score + '
Severity: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.anomaly_severity }], max_tokens: 300, temperature: 0.1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are the Context Agent for AutoFlow. Match current incidents against historical patterns and known scheduled events. Does this anomaly match expected behavior based on time, service, or past incidents? Respond with ONLY valid JSON, no explanation, no markdown.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Assess pattern matching and return ONLY this exact JSON:
{"agent":"context","score":<float 0.0-1.0>,"pattern_match":"<one of: none|partial|strong>","reasoning":"<2 sentence max>","recommended_action":"<one of: ignore|alert|restart_pod|scale_service|reroute_traffic>","confidence":<float 0.0-1.0>}

Incident data:
Service: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.service_name + '
Metric: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_type + ' at ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_value + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.metric_unit + '
Timestamp: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.timestamp + '
Environment: ' + $('Receive Anomaly Event').first().json.environment }], max_tokens: 300, temperature: 0.1 }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT agent_name, current_weight FROM autoflow_agent_weights WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY agent_name;

INSERT INTO autoflow_decisions (decision_id, event_id, service_name, consensus_score, decision, remediation_action, anomaly_agent_score, risk_agent_score, sla_agent_score, context_agent_score, anomaly_reasoning, risk_reasoning, sla_reasoning, context_reasoning, weights_used, decided_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.decision_id }}', '{{ $json.event_id }}', '{{ $json.service_name }}', {{ $json.consensus_score }}, '{{ $json.decision }}', {{ $json.remediation_action ? "'" + $json.remediation_action + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.agents.anomaly.score }}, {{ $json.agents.risk.score }}, {{ $json.agents.sla.score }}, {{ $json.agents.context.score }}, '{{ $json.safe_anomaly_reasoning }}', '{{ $json.safe_risk_reasoning }}', '{{ $json.safe_sla_reasoning }}', '{{ $json.safe_context_reasoning }}', '{{ $json.safe_weights_used }}', '{{ $json.decided_at }}') RETURNING id;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ trigger: "remediate", decision_id: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.decision_id, event_id: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.event_id, service_name: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.service_name, namespace: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.namespace, consensus_score: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.consensus_score, decision: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.decision, remediation_action: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.remediation_action, agents: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents, metric_type: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.metric_type, metric_value: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.metric_value }) }}

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ trigger: "alert", decision_id: $json.decision_id, event_id: $json.event_id, service_name: $json.service_name, namespace: $json.namespace, consensus_score: $json.consensus_score, decision: $json.decision, agents: $json.agents }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE autoflow_events SET status = 'ignored', updated_at = NOW() WHERE event_id = '{{ $('Consensus Engine').first().json.event_id }}';

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ trigger: "alert", decision_id: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.decision_id, event_id: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.event_id, service_name: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.service_name, namespace: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.namespace, consensus_score: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.consensus_score, decision: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.decision, agents: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event_id: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.event_id, service_name: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.service_name, namespace: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.namespace, metric_type: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.metric_type, metric_value: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.metric_value, is_anomaly: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.is_anomaly, z_score: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.z_score, anomaly_severity: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.anomaly_severity, confidence: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.confidence, status: $('Sanitize Event Payload').first().json.is_anomaly ? 'detected' : 'normal' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ decision_id: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.decision_id, event_id: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.event_id, consensus_score: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.consensus_score, decision: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.decision, remediation_action: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.remediation_action, anomaly_agent_score: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents?.anomaly?.score || 0, risk_agent_score: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents?.risk?.score || 0, sla_agent_score: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents?.sla?.score || 0, context_agent_score: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents?.context?.score || 0, anomaly_reasoning: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents?.anomaly?.reasoning || '', risk_reasoning: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents?.risk?.reasoning || '', sla_reasoning: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents?.sla?.reasoning || '', context_reasoning: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.agents?.context?.reasoning || '', weights_used: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.weights_used || {} }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ action_id: 'ign_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2,5), decision_id: $('Consensus Engine').first().json.decision_id, action_type: 'ignored', action_status: 'success', outcome: 'no_action_needed' }) }}
